attributes.action: Reduce tax on petrol and diesel to make living feasible for UK families
attributes.additional_details: Because we've had enough of working like slaves to barely scrape a living
attributes.background: Lower taxes to make petrol and diesel affordable to the UK public in light of the current cost of living crisis. Make it illegal for oil companies to increase profits using war as an excuse.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petitions, which call for similar action:

Make petrol and diesel tax free
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756728

Suspend fuel duty and VAT on fuel until the Iran conflict ends
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763674

Reduce fuel duty and remove VAT on petrol and diesel
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764175
